tunnel_list_empty_description: Import a config to get started.
uninstall_confirm_message: All system extensions used by Phantom-WG will be deactivated. You can then drag Phantom-WG to the Trash to complete uninstallation.
gate_description: Phantom-WG relies on three system extensions. Activate each one and approve it in System Settings to continue.
detail_delete_confirm_message: This will permanently remove the tunnel configuration.
log_empty_description: Logs will appear here when the tunnel is active.
mdns_toggle_description: Pin mDNSResponder DNS queries to the physical interface so listed apps' indirect DNS (Network.framework / libresolv) stays off the tunnel. Disabling lets indirect DNS fall back to the tunnel resolver. Most users should keep this on.
field_err_name_exists: A tunnel with this name already exists.
field_err_ip_invalid: '%@' is not a valid IP address.
field_err_address_invalid_prefix: '%@' is not a valid prefix length.
field_err_address_invalid_addr: '%@' is not a valid IP address.
field_err_endpoint_invalid_port: '%@' is not a valid port number.
field_err_endpoint_invalid_host: '%@' is not a valid host (IP or hostname).
field_err_url_invalid_scheme: Scheme '%@' not supported — expected ws:// or wss://.
field_err_url_missing_host: URL is missing the host component.
error_duplicate_name: A tunnel with that name already exists.
sysext_err_unsupported_location: The app must be in /Applications to install the system extension.
sysext_err_not_found: System extension bundle not found inside the app.
sysext_err_code_signature: Code signature is invalid. The app may need to be re-signed.
sysext_err_validation: System extension validation failed. Check entitlements and provisioning profile.
sysext_err_system_policy: Blocked by system policy. Check System Settings → Privacy & Security.
sysext_err_entitlement: Missing entitlement. The app may need to be re-signed.
split_tunneling_enable_description: When disabled the feature is paused; your app list is preserved.
split_tunneling_interface_footer: Traffic from listed apps exits through this interface, regardless of whether a tunnel is active.
split_tunneling_exclude_applications_foo: Listed applications exit through the selected physical interface instead of the active tunnel.
split_tunneling_empty_state_description: Add applications to route their traffic through the selected interface instead of the active tunnel.
split_tunneling_interface_unavailable_me: The physical interface "%@" is not present. Routed apps will fail to connect until it returns or you pick another.
split_tunneling_reset_confirm_message: This will clear all selected applications and disable the feature. Your configuration cannot be recovered.
split_tunneling_err_not_a_bundle: The selected file is not a valid application bundle.
split_tunneling_err_no_bundle_id: The application has no bundle identifier and cannot be added.
split_tunneling_err_not_signed: The application is not properly signed and cannot be verified.
split_tunneling_err_duplicate: This application is already in the list.
